summary: Test suite has reasonable structure but is non-functional due to missing fixture files. Tests reference fixtures/basic-config.json, fixtures/exclude-config.json, fixtures/include-config.json, fixtures/full-config.json, and fixtures/overflow-config.json—none of which appear in the workspace file list. The test_fixtures_exist() test will fail immediately, blocking all functional tests. Even if fixtures were created, coverage is incomplete: no tests for error cases (invalid JSON, missing files) through act, no tests for edge cases (empty matrices, single-value axes, boundary conditions around max-size), and no tests validating the workflow file itself (referenced but not provided in workspace). The workflow file at .github/workflows/environment-matrix-generator.yml is also missing from the provided files, making it impossible to verify it exists or is actionlint-compliant. JSON extraction from act output is somewhat fragile, relying on string parsing and act log formatting. Test design is good in principle (clear separation of structure vs. functional tests, proper cleanup with try/finally), but the implementation depends entirely on external fixtures that don't exist.
